review_title: The simplest platform for people without technical knowledge.
description: The advantage for an agency is being able to provide its clients with a high-performing and easy-to-manage platform at an affordable price.Best CMS product on the market for facilitating access for service businesses.
author: MarieEve M.
pros: Easy to use, user-friendly, fast. Each feature is interesting.
cons: At the moment, there are only a few templates available.

review_title: Easiest CMS I ever worked with!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how you can create customized page easily by choosing different pre-built blocks of content and tools.Each blocks of content already includes call to action buttons wich is usually missing in most content designs.
cons: Only con is the fact that they still have limited templates options, but plenty are being designed right now and looking forward to use the new ones.

description: A website should not be complicated to put together. No pluggins. No hosting nigtmare. RubberDuck was great to launch a simple website quickly.
author: Justine G.
pros: I like that it's easy to use and customize. I was able to publish a website in a couple of minutes.
cons: When I first starter to use it the preview functionnality was not that great. But it has been improved since.

author: Olivier G.
pros: Easy to work with and fast to setup. Website automatically looks nice without spending a ton of time on it.
cons: Honestly every feature is nice. Just wish I knew them sooner instead of wasting time on wix.

author: Caroline B.
pros: Our platform is friendly to use for me and my customers.
cons: I hav'nt negaitve points about my experience with Rubberduck.

description: Best website platform on the market
author: Chantal C.
pros: so userfriendly, excellent service, cheap and fun!
cons: Nothing, everything is just perfect, should have use it way before

author: Frederique L.
pros: Perfect for a service business! RubberDuck provides its clients with a user-friendly platform (especially for someone who doesn't usually do this for a living) at a very competitive price. Always helpful and open to discuss.
cons: Few templates available, but still enough for a service business.

author: Louis G.
pros: Easy communication with the staff, great look and easy to learn CMS
cons: No E-Commerce, but this is the only con I can find

description: Great people developing a great product. It's an awesome alternative to wordpress
author: Nicolas R.
pros: I like that the patform is built with SEO, tagging and translating in mind.
cons: Can't edit code directly on the server. It could be good for people that know how to edit php, html or css

review_title: User friendly and great customer service !
description: It will make updating my website way easier !
author: Frédéric A.
pros: Fast and easy to use. But with all the features needed.
cons: Everything was better than expected, I recommend strongly
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Mon expérience globale d'utilisation de RubberDuck est sans contraintes et avec beaucoup de facilité.
author: James M.
pros: Les aspects de RubberDuck que j'apprécie le plus sont la facilité d'utilisation et le service à la clientèle.
cons: L'aspect de RubberDuck que j'ai le moins apprécié est de ne pas l'avoir découvert avant.

author: Ghislain R.
pros: C’est un jeu d’enfant concevoir un site web avec rubberduck
cons: Aucun.

description: Pour un site vitrine beau et responsive, c'est vraiment un très beau produit.
author: Josyanne C.
pros: Facilité d'utilisation, Accès rapide au support client,Modules structurés qui facilitent la personnalisation
cons: Il arrive que le téléchargement soit au ralenti. Refresh la page et c'est réglé.

description: Un très grand gain de temps grâce à Rubberduck !
author: Fabien P.
pros: La création de site web est rendue tellement simple et efficace. Tout est réfléchi pour aller à l'essentiel. L'équipe est également au top.
cons: Davantage de template et de personnalisation

author: Olivier P.
pros: Facilité d’utilisation , plaisant à utiliser et très rapide.
cons: Rien de special.. j’ai hâte de voir les prochains templates!

author: Maxime G.
pros: Service à la clientèle efficace et disponible
cons: Seulement quelques modèles différents disponibles
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Sébastien D.
pros: Les formats déjà établis. "Template"
cons: Créé le site est dificile quand on ne connait pas la base.

author: Katline B.
pros: User friendly, easy to edit a page, quick
cons: Nothing.. it's really easy to use and really simple

author: Pierre Olivier P.
pros: Facile d’utilisation et très user friendly!
cons: Transaction impossible sur le site pour le moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mattieu B.
pros: Simplicité, réponse rapide et personnels courtois
cons: Rien détesté , le produit a répondu à tous mes besoins
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sylvain L.
pros: Make a website in a few hours. Load very fast.
cons: I would like more templates. Every profession should have 5 templates minimum.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
